name: Frank-Kebabs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium Green pepper - cut into 12 squares
6 All-meat franks - cut in thirds (2 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook green pepper squares in boiling water for 3 minutes.
2. Thread the vegetables and frankfurters onto six 12-inch skewers.
3. Brush the kebabs with barbecue sauce.
4. Broil, occasionally basting with sauce, until browned on both sides. This should take about 15 minutes total cooking time.
Calories per serving (1 kebab): About 220
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
